articles.title: Two boys rescued from Venezuela earthquake rubble after days of being trapped
articles.description: Rescuers spent six hours carefully digging to reach one of the boys, as many residents continue searching through the rubble by hand, still waiting for heavy machinery to arrive.

articles.title: I hear my son crying beneath the rubble, says Venezuela earthquake survivor
articles.description: Andreina Valerio says she fears for her son, who is trapped with her partner and in-laws beneath a collapsed building.

articles.title: Eleven killed after plane carrying skydivers crashes in eastern France
articles.description: The pilot and 10 passengers died in the incident, local officials said.

articles.title: World Cup knockouts are here - what is England's path to the final?
articles.description: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the final after qualifying for the knockout stages.
